patterns.label: Generic genre marketing subtitle
patterns.description: Matches article-led subtitles such as 'A Humorous Isekai LitRPG' or 'A Xianxia Progression Fantasy'.

patterns.label: Genre adventure or epic suffix
patterns.description: Matches common phrases such as 'A LitRPG Adventure', 'An Isekai Epic', or 'A Progression Fantasy Epic'.
